title: Appliances [Cobblemon]
description: Sidemod for the Rotom Appliances addon that adds 5 new Blocks for Rotom to possess!
body:
![Rotom Appliances](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46ea78c849d17dc99dc42dfb1372b34c901ab15e_0.webp)

## This is the mod version of Rotom Appliances
This adds 5 new blocks for Rotom to possess, if you only want Rotom and not those custom blocks, get the datapack version without the blocks from [here!](https://modrinth.com/datapack/rotom-appliances) 

**The latest Datapack from the link above is still required!**

## Want even more?
This mod is fully compatible with AllTheMons, Mega Showdown & [MissingMons v3.4+](https://modrinth.com/datapack/missingmons-cobblemon), which adds many custom animations to each appliance, go and check it out if you haven't already! 

## Appliances for Rotom to possess

![All Appliances](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f65ed9011140adfbed5a052213d3c9503fe42f08.png)

## Dependencies and Installation
- Cobblemon 1.6+ _(No 1.5.2 backport planned)_
- Fabric: none 
- NeoForge: **requires** [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector)  

**Mod Part:**
1. Download the latest version of this mod
2. Add the jar to your `\mods` directory

**Addon Part:**
1. Download the latest datapack from [here](https://modrinth.com/datapack/rotom-appliances)
2. Add that pack to your resourcepacks `\resourcepacks`
3. Add that pack to your **worlds** datapack `\saves\[YOURWORLDNAME]\datapacks`
4. Enable the resourcepack ingame `ESC - Options - Resource Pack`

## How to switch forms?
1. Craft your desired appliance block
2. Place down the block 
3. Right-click it with Rotom in your party _(yes, you can click multiple)_
4. Evolve Rotom!

To revert back to his base form, craft a `Dubious Bulb` and use it on him!
 
## Where does he spawn?
- In [Woodland Mansions](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Woodland_Mansion) _(uncommon)_
- in Ancient Cities in the [Redstone Room](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Ancient_City#Redstone_circuits) _(uncommon)_
- On Beaches _(ultra-rare but you'll find plenty when its thundering!)_
- Near* Cobblemon Tech _(PCs, Healers, Fossil Analyzers, Restoration Tanks, Data Monitors)_ _(rare)_
- Near* Redstone components! _(Blocks, Torches, Ores, Lamps, Repeaters, Comparators, Daylight Detectors, Lightning Rods)_ _(rare)_

*near meaning a 9x5x9 area around said block

## Frequently asked questions (FAQ) & Support link:


<details>
<summary>Click to unfold</summary>
  
### I have a question about the frequently asked questions!
- Join the [cobblemon discord](https://discord.com/invite/cobblemon), and pay me a visit [here](https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1340530002185158767)!

### Is this compatible with the `<NAME>` addon?
- This is compatible with **every** addon, as long as it does **not** add Rotom, like SaltMons! (except MissingMons, that's specifically made to be compatible)

### Does this work for NeoForge?
- Yes but it requires [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) until I make a NeoForge port myself _(which is a very low priority for me rn as sinytra works fine)_

### He's not showing on my Pokenav or when I do a /checkspawn!
- Make sure you tried in different positions **on the ground** or near **spawnable area**
- Make sure you checked the correct bucket
- Make sure you meet **all** requirements _(biome, structure, blocks etc.)_
- make sure you **correctly** installed the **addon part**

### Can I use this on my server?
- Private servers? - Go catch 'em all!
- Public servers? - **Only** as long as you follow those rules: 
  - You **must** give appropriate credit to this
    - _be it a link, mention of this mods name + creator - you'll find a way!_
    - _don't claim you made this_ :(
  - You **cannot** make money 
    - _no paid servers/microtransactions_

</details>
